settings.name: Harsh Gupta
settings.title: Full-Stack Developer | AI/ML Enthusiast | 2x Hackathon Semi-Finalist (Mastek Deep Blue, INDRADHANU)
settings.summary: Aspiring Computer Engineering student with strong problem-solving skills and hands-on experience in building scalable systems.

items.description: Gained hands-on experience in full-stack web development using Node.js, Express.js, and core JavaScript concepts. Worked with JDBC and PostgreSQL for database connectivity and integration. Contributed to ReWear, a web-based platform for community clothing exchange.

items.company: Netleap It Training and Solutions , Nashik
items.description: Built Power BI dashboards using DAX, created churn prediction reports, and performed data modeling for actionable business insights
Completed a 10-week Ethical Hacking internship, performing vulnerability assessments and penetration testing on web applications. Explored XSS vulnerabilities using Wappalyzer and HackTool.
Completed a 10-week AI-ML internship, working on data preprocessing. Gained practical experience in supervised and unsupervised learning & AI workflows.

items.title: ChurnPredict: Customer Churn Prediction Engine
items.description: Engineered an end-to-end machine learning pipeline in a Jupyter Notebook to analyze customer data and predict churn probability. Implemented robust data preprocessing, feature engineering, and multiple model training (e.g., Random Forest, XGBoost).

items.title: Mastek Hackathon - Expense Analyzer for Students (EAS)
items.description: Developed an AI-powered expense tracking web application, reaching Semi-Finals. Built an NLP-powered SMS parser to extract merchant, amount, and date from UPI messages. Implemented an ML engine with self-learning feedback loop for continuous improvement in transaction categorization accuracy. Designed an interactive dashboard.

items.title: Advanced C++ Training - IIT Bombay Spoken Tutorial
items.description: Completed advanced C++ with 100% score, certified by IIT Bombay & EduPyramids.

items.title: Quantum Computing Training – C-DAC Hyderabad & IIT Roorkee
items.description: Completed one-month program with 79.44%, covering Qubits, Quantum Gates, Algorithms, Qiskit, and Quantum ML.
